title: Successful Northern Summit County Plumbing Company
supportTraining: Owners willing to provide 20 days of training and can be available for paid consultation after that.
description:
Strong opportunity to acquire a profitable, full-service plumbing company serving northern Summit County and portions of Cuyahoga County. Established 25 years ago, the business has built a reputation for dependable, repeat service within its market.

The company generates consistent annual revenue of approximately $210,000, producing $145,000 in cash flow in 2024 and $140,000 in 2023.

Whether expanding an existing operation or acquiring a stable platform to operate independently, this well-established, cash-flowing business presents a straightforward and profitable acquisition opportunity.

With the current owners retiring, the business presents a solid foundation for new ownership to leverage its reputation and explore further growth prospects. This transition offers an exciting venture for those ready to build upon a legacy of excellence in the Northeast Ohio.

Ad#:2476477
